description:
You are an IT Project Manager at a professional services consulting firm. The sales team has just closed a major deal with Meridian Health Systems, a 500-bed hospital network. You need to set up the project communication infrastructure and coordinate the handoff from sales to delivery. Log in to Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!).

Establish the project's communication structure based on the client briefing in the #sales-handoffs channel. This includes creating a private channel named 'proj-meridian-internal' (Topic: 'Meridian Health Systems | EHR Integration Platform | $2.4M | Discovery: Mar-Apr 2026') for solutions.architect, delivery.lead, ux.designer, and data.engineer, featuring a pinned kickoff message containing the client overview, technical requirements (HL7 FHIR, real-time sync, HIPAA logging), identified risk factors, and proposed timeline milestones. Additionally, create a public channel named 'proj-meridian-client' (Topic: 'Meridian Health Systems - EHR Integration Project | Client Communication Channel') for solutions.architect, delivery.lead, account.manager, and client.sponsor, containing a welcome message introducing the delivery team and confirming the kickoff timeline. Confirm the setup is complete by replying to the briefing thread in #sales-handoffs and direct message solutions.architect to request a technical assessment of the HL7 FHIR integration requirements and the legacy lab system API gap.
